items.label: Mood Grid Reveal
items.meta: v2: ONE big moodboard (webcore, zoomed + slowly panning) behind a grid of squares w/ thin white lines — cells you occupy punch through to footage.

items.label: Fadi Grid
items.meta: Every square strobes its own random Fadi color (re-rolls every 3 frames); cells you occupy punch through to footage. (your idea #2)

items.label: Silhouette Window
items.meta: Inverse grid-reveal: the moodboard shows through YOUR silhouette only — you're a walking window, white contour edge.

items.label: Spotlight
items.meta: World drops dark, soft elliptical pool of light around you, faint Fadi tint.

items.label: Frame Trails
items.meta: Rectangles of where you WERE — past bounding boxes trail you in cycling colors.

items.label: Pixel Me
items.meta: You get mosaiced into chunky pixels; the world stays sharp.

items.label: Duotone Split
items.meta: Bg becomes a two-color Fadi duotone split at your centerline; you stay full color.

items.label: Glitch Column
items.meta: The column of pixels under you smears across the whole frame — you stand on your own streak.

items.label: Type Orbit
items.meta: 'all works out' orbiting your body on an ellipse, behind you.

items.label: Venetian Blinds
items.meta: Scrolling horizontal blinds alternate footage / moodboard; you punch through everything.

items.label: Band Behind — Rainbow
items.meta: Thick 7-color Fadi band through your torso, behind you. Stripes march on beats.

items.label: Band Behind — Solid
items.meta: Same band, single Fadi color riding the global color cycle.

items.label: Vertical Beam
items.meta: Rainbow beam locked to your x-position, behind you.

items.label: Big Word Behind
items.meta: Giant 'all works out' behind your head, tracks your position.

items.label: Word Stack Wall
items.meta: 'works' stacked full-height in cycling rainbow behind you.

items.label: Negative Space Fill
items.meta: Detects which side you're on, floods the empty side with solid Fadi color.

items.label: Split Invert
items.meta: Frame splits at your centerline; the far side inverts.

items.label: Echo Row — Squares
items.meta: Time-delayed silhouettes of you marching outward in Fadi colors.

items.label: Echo Row — Graffiti
items.meta: Same trails on the graffiti wall footage.

items.label: Halo Rings
items.meta: Concentric Fadi rings emanate from your centroid.

items.label: Frame Inset PiP
items.meta: Stage dims, a zoomed crop of you PiPs into the negative space.

items.label: Cutout Shadow — Graffiti
items.meta: Bg goes black; you're cut out over time-delayed color shadow silhouettes.

items.label: Cutout Shadow — Squares
items.meta: Same on the tunnel (you're small — shadows get tiny; judging scale limits).

items.label: Mondrian Panels
items.meta: Fadi panels partitioned around your bbox, reshuffling every 2 beats.

items.label: Ground Reflection
items.meta: White line at your feet + Fadi mirror silhouette below.

items.label: Band Behind — Street
items.meta: The rainbow band on the night street footage.

items.label: a1 · count up cells
items.meta: [grid rules] One Fadi cell lights per beat in a shuffled order until the frame is full colour, then it all resets — a loading bar made of the song.

items.label: a1 · luma grid
items.meta: [grid rules] Cells go moodboard where the FOOTAGE is dark — the image eats itself.

items.label: a2 · velocity grid
items.meta: [grid rules] The board only bleeds through while you're MOVING; stand still and the footage heals.

items.label: a3 · ripple grid
items.meta: [grid rules] Reveal wave: cells flip to the board in an expanding ring from you.

items.label: a4 · checker pop
items.meta: [grid rules] Checkerboard of footage/board; the parity FLIPS on every beat.

items.label: a5 · column race
items.meta: [grid rules] Everything you've WALKED PAST turns to board — columns left of you flip (or right, if you're facing the other way).

items.label: a6 · row equalizer
items.meta: [grid rules] Solid Fadi rows rise from the floor to exactly your height — the frame is an EQ bar and you're the level.

items.label: a7 · grid magnet
items.meta: [grid rules] Inverse mood-grid: the board clings NEAR you and footage lives far — you drag the moodboard around like a field.

items.label: a8 · diag wipe cells
items.meta: [grid rules] A cell-quantized wipe front sweeps the frame corner-to-corner forever; board on one side, you punch through both.

items.label: a9 · cell jitter
items.meta: [grid rules] Cells you touch get knocked loose — occupied cells jitter offset with a Fadi edge, everything else holds still.

items.label: b1 · cutout paper
items.meta: [stencil] Flat paper poster: solid Fadi background, you cut out with one hard drop shadow.

items.label: b1 · stencil stack
items.meta: [stencil] Three time-staggered copies of your silhouette, each a window into a DIFFERENT moodboard.

items.label: b2 · contour topo
items.meta: [stencil] Topographic you: expanding dilated outlines of your body ring outward in the palette.

items.label: b3 · edge neon
items.meta: [stencil] The world goes near-black; only your outline burns in cycling neon.

items.label: b4 · me negative
items.meta: [stencil] The world stays true; YOU are the negative.

items.label: b5 · me static
items.meta: [stencil] You're a person-shaped hole of analog static in an otherwise normal shot.

items.label: b6 · body loop
items.meta: [stencil] A transparent Fadi loop plays INSIDE your silhouette — you're made of the brand system.

items.label: b7 · halo leak
items.meta: [stencil] The moodboard leaks out around your edges — an aura of somewhere else.

items.label: b8 · double exposure
items.meta: [stencil] You are filled with yourself two seconds ago — a walking double exposure.

items.label: b9 · xray
items.meta: [stencil] Inside your silhouette the image flips to an inverted, edge-burned x-ray; the world stays normal.

items.label: c1 · body slices
items.meta: [stamps] You get shredded into horizontal ribbons, each slice thrown a different distance sideways.

items.label: c1 · kaleido me
items.meta: [stamps] Kaleidoscope: your silhouette mirrored four ways around frame center, each copy a different Fadi color.

items.label: c2 · radial stamps
items.meta: [stamps] Small copies of your silhouette circle around you like a clock of selves.

items.label: c3 · shrink army
items.meta: [stamps] A marching row of progressively smaller you crossing the floor line.

items.label: c4 · stamp rain
items.meta: [stamps] Tiny colored yous rain down the frame behind you.

items.label: c5 · mirror floor
items.meta: [stamps] A real mirror floor: the actual footage of you reflected below your feet, fading with depth.

items.label: c6 · wall shadow
items.meta: [stamps] A hard black sun-shadow of you thrown up the wall behind, skewed.

items.label: c7 · stamp trail scale
items.meta: [stamps] Your past selves trail behind you AND shrink with age — a vanishing history.

items.label: c8 · twin delay
items.meta: [stamps] A full-color twin of you from a second ago performs beside you.

items.label: c9 · crowd fill
items.meta: [stamps] The negative space fills with a tiled crowd of tiny silhouette-yous in all seven colors.

items.label: d1 · shatter shift
items.meta: [warps] The frame breaks into big glass tiles; tiles near you slide out of register.

items.label: d1 · ripple out
items.meta: [warps] The world ripples in rings emanating from wherever you stand.

items.label: d2 · column shift
items.meta: [warps] Pixel columns you occupy get pushed upward — you shove the image out of your way.

items.label: d3 · row shear
items.meta: [warps] Rows shear sideways proportional to your movement speed — the frame drags behind your motion.

items.label: d4 · mirror split
items.meta: [warps] The world mirrors at your centerline — you are the axis of symmetry.

items.label: d5 · zoom pull
items.meta: [warps] Vertigo: the background zooms breathing in and out of your position; you stay pin sharp.

items.label: d6 · pixel drip
items.meta: [warps] Everything below you melts — the columns under your body drip to the bottom of the frame.

items.label: d7 · chroma pull
items.meta: [warps] Radial chromatic aberration blooming away from you — RGB tears apart at the edges of your world.

items.label: d8 · lens bulge
items.meta: [warps] A magnifying lens travels with you, bulging the image around your body.

items.label: d9 · wave flag
items.meta: [warps] The whole frame waves like fabric; the harder you move, the harder it flaps.

items.label: e1 · ghost pull
items.meta: [time] A fading Fadi ghost of where you just were chases you in place.

items.label: e1 · slit horizontal
items.meta: [time] Slitscan: every row of the frame comes from a different moment — time smears vertically.

items.label: e2 · slit vertical
items.meta: [time] Slitscan sideways: columns further right live further in the past.

items.label: e3 · motion extract
items.meta: [time] Only MOVEMENT is visible — the still world goes black, change burns in Fadi color.

items.label: e4 · freeze grid
items.meta: [time] A wall of frozen moments: each cell holds a different past instant, refreshing round-robin — you live across all of them.

items.label: e5 · long exposure
items.meta: [time] Light-painting: bright pixels persist and decay slowly — you drag luminous smears through the frame.

items.label: e6 · strobe freeze
items.meta: [time] The world freezes on every beat; only you keep moving through the stills.

items.label: e7 · time split
items.meta: [time] Left half now, right half 1.5 seconds ago — you can cross into your own past.

items.label: e8 · onion skin
items.meta: [time] Animator's onion skin: three ghosts of your recent past layered under the live frame.

items.label: e9 · rewind stack
items.meta: [time] Vertical bands stepping back in time toward the right edge, hard Fadi seams between epochs.

items.label: f1 · subtitle echo
items.meta: [type+data] One word zoom-echoed at five sizes behind you — type with depth.

items.label: f1 · coord hud
items.meta: [type+data] Live coordinates: crosshair + x/y readout pinned to your centroid, corner ticks on your bbox — pure micrographic HUD.

items.label: f2 · word ticker
items.meta: [type+data] A stock-ticker band of lyric words scrolls along your feet line.

items.label: f3 · count beats
items.meta: [type+data] A giant bar-counter (1 2 3 4) strobes behind you on the grid of the song.

items.label: f4 · ascii bg
items.meta: [type+data] The world renders as text — background quantized to glyph-brightness blocks; you stay photographic.

items.label: f5 · word gravity
items.meta: [type+data] Lyric words rain from the sky and pile up on your head and shoulders.

items.label: f6 · type curtain
items.meta: [type+data] Giant vertical word-columns fill the negative space either side of you like curtains.

items.label: f7 · area meter
items.meta: [type+data] An instrument panel: a live bar meter of how much frame you occupy, with % readout — closer = louder.

items.label: f8 · name repeat
items.meta: [type+data] 'adam fadi' wallpapered across the frame; rows nearest you glow brightest.

items.label: f9 · clock orbit
items.meta: [type+data] Timecode digits orbit you like a data halo.

items.label: g1 · vignette color
items.meta: [color fields] A breathing colored vignette closes in on your position like a tunnel of light.

items.label: g1 · posterize pal
items.meta: [color fields] The whole world posterized to the nearest of the seven Fadi colors; you stay photographic.

items.label: g2 · heat dist
items.meta: [color fields] Proximity heatmap: the background is colored purely by distance to you, banded through the palette.

items.label: g3 · luma bands
items.meta: [color fields] The image contour-maps itself: brightness quantized into Fadi bands like elevation lines.

items.label: g4 · hue wave
items.meta: [color fields] A tint-wave sweeps across the background left to right forever.

items.label: g5 · gradient sky
items.meta: [color fields] Studio backdrop: the entire background swapped for a vertical Fadi gradient — suddenly it's a color shoot.

items.label: g6 · scanline tint
items.meta: [color fields] CRT scanlines in two alternating Fadi colors ride the background.

items.label: g7 · channel swap bg
items.meta: [color fields] The background's RGB channels rotate every beat — reality cycles through wrong colors; you stay correct.

items.label: g8 · threshold ink
items.meta: [color fields] Two-tone screenprint: background reduced to black + one Fadi ink; you in full color on top.

items.label: g9 · fadi noise
items.meta: [color fields] Confetti static: background pixels randomly snap to palette colors, reshuffling every few frames.

items.label: h1 · dip flash
items.meta: [multi-source] On every beat the world dips to solid Fadi for two frames — a color heartbeat with you riding on top.

items.label: h1 · board split
items.meta: [multi-source] The world CHANGES at your body: everything left of you is the moodboard's world, everything right stays real.

items.label: h2 · loop corners
items.meta: [multi-source] Four different transparent Fadi loops pinned to the corners frame you like living stickers.

items.label: h3 · board floor
items.meta: [multi-source] The bottom third becomes moodboard flooring — you stand on the reference world.

items.label: h4 · sky swap fadi
items.meta: [multi-source] Everything above your head becomes the board — a swapped sky that follows your height.

items.label: h5 · tri stack
items.meta: [multi-source] Three stacked realities — board / footage / inverted footage — and you pass through all of them intact.

items.label: h6 · multi board wall
items.meta: [multi-source] A wall of windows, each cell playing a DIFFERENT moodboard; the cells you occupy open onto the real footage.

items.label: h7 · picture frame
items.meta: [multi-source] The moodboard becomes a thick living frame; the footage survives only in the center window — until you lean out of it.

items.label: h8 · loop rain
items.meta: [multi-source] A column of transparent Fadi loops scrolls down behind you like brand weather.

items.label: h9 · static gate
items.meta: [multi-source] Reality flickers: the background flips footage/board on every beat — you never flicker.

items.label: i1 · trail ribbon
items.meta: [particles] A ribbon of light traces the exact path your body has travelled through the frame.

items.label: i1 · confetti burst
items.meta: [particles] Confetti erupts from your chest on every beat and falls with gravity.

items.label: i2 · orbit dots
items.meta: [particles] Electrons: dots orbit your body on three tilted rings.

items.label: i3 · spark feet
items.meta: [particles] Sparks kick up from your feet while you move — grinding the floor.

items.label: i4 · beam scan
items.meta: [particles] A scanner beam sweeps the frame; wherever it crosses your body it flashes and briefly exposes the board.

items.label: i5 · laser web
items.meta: [particles] Tracking lasers: lines from the frame corners and edges converge on you wherever you go.

items.label: i6 · bounce ball
items.meta: [particles] A Fadi ball bounces off the top of your head, forever.

items.label: i7 · rain lines
items.meta: [particles] Neon rain that refuses to touch you — the streaks part around your silhouette.

items.label: i8 · grid pulse
items.meta: [particles] A wireframe grid over the world; the lines glow and thicken near your body like you charge them.

items.label: i9 · star field
items.meta: [particles] A parallax starfield streams behind you; your movement speed drives warp speed.

items.label: j1 · film burn
items.meta: [camera fakes] Projector trouble on the beat: gate weave, edge burn blooming in, film grain everywhere.

items.label: j1 · crash zoom
items.meta: [camera fakes] Fake crash-zoom: the camera punches into your face on every beat and eases back out.

items.label: j2 · dutch sway
items.meta: [camera fakes] The frame breathes on a slow dutch-angle sway, pivoting around you.

items.label: j3 · handheld shake
items.meta: [camera fakes] Aggressive handheld energy: micro-jitter always, a violent kick on every beat.

items.label: j4 · split screen duo
items.meta: [camera fakes] Split-screen duo: wide you on the left, tight close-up you on the right — one take, two shots.

items.label: j5 · pip zoom stack
items.meta: [camera fakes] Droste: the frame contains itself, three levels deep, each nested copy pinned near you.

items.label: j6 · freeze stamp beat
items.meta: [camera fakes] Every bar drops a new polaroid freeze of you into a growing stack in the corner.

items.label: j7 · whip pan board
items.meta: [camera fakes] Every two bars the camera whip-pans — the frame smears horizontally and lands in the moodboard world, then whips back.

items.label: j8 · letterbox track
items.meta: [camera fakes] Cinemascope bars that ride your height — the movie crops itself around you.

items.label: j9 · security cam
items.meta: [camera fakes] CCTV: green-washed, scanline flicker, REC dot, timestamp — and your bbox tagged SUBJECT 001.
